title: Last Call
description: A minecraft modpack to make your playing experience more enjoyable with friends
body:
#  🔥 Last Call ❄️
## A Hardcore Minecraft Survival Modpack

Last Call is a survival-focused Minecraft modpack that pushes players to their limits. 🌍 The Overworld, Nether, and End have been fully revamped with enhanced terrain generation, redesigned biomes, and dangerous new structures that reward exploration and punish mistakes.

 🌋 Revamped Dimensions
 Explore brutal Nether landscapes, mysterious End terrain, and a reimagined Overworld where every biome feels fresh and alive.

 🥶🔥 Extreme Survival Mechanics
 Surviving is more than just hunger and health. New heat and cold systems force players to adapt to extreme climates. Overheat in scorching regions ☀️ or freeze in icy biomes ❄️ without the right gear and preparation.

 ⚔️ Every Choice Matters
 Progression is immersive and unforgiving. Smart planning, resource management, and environmental awareness are key to staying alive.

 💀 Last Call delivers a tense, atmospheric survival experience where danger is everywhere — and every adventure could be your last.
 
⚠️ warning! use datapack William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld for world generation otherwise overworld will stay same and only other dimensions change.

-if u get any problems making the modpack work well contact me on discord: 

discordapp.com/user/1185982088734842973
